CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Consolidated with case No. CGC-16-552963. No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
